expectations.text: behavioral_check: Names `custom_pipeline_authoring.md` as the first reference
expectations.evidence: Names it conceptually as 'the **custom pipeline / writing your own table** reference' — picks the right reference even without using the exact filename. Clearly the right concept identification.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Explicitly identifies `spyglassmixin_methods.md` as a distractor and explains the author-vs-consumer split
expectations.evidence: Doesn't mention spyglassmixin_methods.md as a distractor at all; merely contrasts authoring vs. consuming pipelines in passing without flagging the specific consumer-side reference.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Mentions the `_object_id` + AnalysisNwbfile FK convention as a signal that this is an authoring task
expectations.evidence: Step 2 of the canonical write path: 'AnalysisNwbfile().add_nwb_object(...) to get back an object_id'. Step 4 stores 'analysis_file_name and the returned object_id on the key' — the _object_id pattern signals authoring.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Does not recommend merge_methods.md or ingestion.md as the first stop
expectations.evidence: Custom-pipeline reference first; merge-table reference is 'only if you intend the new table to feed a _Merge table downstream'. Ingestion not raised.
